markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demo GrowthX's AI content platform and discuss a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Plaid's Bottleneck:** Internal review and publishing processes limit content output to 2–3 articles/week, far below GrowthX's proposed daily cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A two-track system to bypass the bottleneck: fast-track general SEO content (no Plaid mentions) and maintain a slower, high-scrutiny track for product-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Platform:** Uses a "Content OS" with client-specific "Artifacts" (personas, brand guides) and a "Knowledge Base" (research graph) to create context-rich, brand-aligned content.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Pricing:** A $40k strategy sprint, then $15k/mo for editorial services, with interactive tools (e.g., a "solution finder" quiz) as a $12k–$15k/mo add-on.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2484.0)

## Topics

### Plaid's Content Bottlenecks

  - [Plaid's internal processes limit content output to 2–3 articles/week, preventing the scale needed for new areas like AI and fintech.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Key Bottlenecks:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [**Review Process:** High-scrutiny reviews for all content, especially anything mentioning Plaid.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Marketing Ops:** A multi-day setup for each article's attribution campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**CMS Publishing:** Insufficient internal bandwidth for daily uploads.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [**Potential Solution:** A two-track review system.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Track 1 (Fast):** General SEO content (no Plaid mentions) → faster review.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Track 2 (Slow):** Product-specific content → full review, including compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### GrowthX's Content OS & Workflow

  - [GrowthX's platform automates content creation using a "Content OS" built on two pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** Client-specific documents (personas, brand guides) that define the content's lens.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Knowledge Base:** A technical knowledge graph (built with EXA, Tably) for research, optimizing for retrieval and speed.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [**Automated Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
    1.  [**Brief Generation:** Automates keyword analysis, competitor research, and SEO metadata.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
    2.  [**Deep Research:** Uses a research plan to answer questions, citing all sources.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
    3.  [**Fact-Checking:** Assigns a confidence score to each passage; suggests rewrites for unverified claims (e.g., changing a specific "14.3% gain" to a general "can improve").](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2059.0)
  - [**EEAT Signals:** GrowthX can assign content to a specific client expert (e.g., a tax manager for Ramp.com) to build Expertise, Experience, Authoritativeness, and Trust.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)

### Performance & ROI

  - [GrowthX shared performance metrics from current clients:](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)
      - [**Discern:** 25% revenue growth; ranks for 346 new non-branded keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)
      - [**Exec:** 46x growth in LLM referral traffic (16 → 741 sessions) in 6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Organic traffic grew from \~20k to \~50k/month.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)
  - [Plaid requested case studies from more mature companies, not just startups.](https://fathom.video/share/ZxZTQFey4WjVzysCaudzCsCrBC1NMo2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2475.0)
